# Myweli

Myweli is the beauty & wellness booking platform for Côte d'Ivoire. Consumers
find and book salons — coiffure (hair), barbier (barber), onglerie (nails) and
spa — online, 24/7, in French. Salons manage bookings, deposits and automated
WhatsApp/SMS reminders. Mobile-first; native apps on Android & iOS plus the web.

## About
- Name: Myweli
- Area served: Côte d'Ivoire — Abidjan and its communes (Cocody, Plateau,
  Yopougon, Marcory, Treichville, Adjamé, Abobo, Koumassi, …).
- Offering: online appointment booking for beauty & wellness providers; no-custody
  Mobile Money deposits (Wave / Orange Money / MTN / Moov), paid directly to the
  salon.

## Key pages
- Home: /
- Provider page: /<slug>  (e.g. /beaute-divine)
- Category by commune: /<categorie>-<commune>  (e.g. /tresses-cocody)
